overall.description: First-person driving sequence through a desert highway in a video game engine (GTA V style), featuring wet pavement reflecting an overcast sky. The camera travels steadily past a large roadside billboard and sparse oncoming traffic, with Joshua trees and distant mountains lining the arid landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with large roadside billboard

events.description: oncoming sedan passes in the left lane heading opposite direction
second oncoming vehicle approaches and passes on the left

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily along the right lane of the wet highway, approaching the large billboard

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving in opposite direction passes by at high speed

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with character advertisement mounted on metal supports
metal guardrail running along the median between highway lanes
scattered desert yucca trees dotting the arid landscape on both sides
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the desert flats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate desert highway under overcast skies, with wet asphalt reflecting the gray light. A large billboard stands prominently on the right while the camera approaches it at steady driving speed. Sparse traffic passes in the opposite lane, and Joshua trees punctuate the barren landscape extending toward distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with median guardrail

events.description: passes the billboard which exits the frame to the right, opening up the view
oncoming truck passes in the left lane
passes yellow road marker barrier in the median

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway past the billboard, maintaining speed along the wet road

entered.detail: yellow rectangular road marker or barrier positioned in the highway median

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the view opens up to an endless stretch of desert highway. The camera continues driving past a yellow median marker and alongside the metal guardrail. Sparse oncoming traffic continues to pass in the opposite lane as the road stretches toward the hazy horizon, flanked by scattered Joshua trees and distant hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a desolate desert highway that transitions from a focused approach toward a roadside landmark into an expansive view of the open horizon. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting a gray, overcast sky, moving steadily toward a large, prominent billboard on the right. As the camera passes the billboard, the perspective opens up to reveal an endless stretch of road flanked by scattered Joshua trees and distant mountains. The scene then shifts to follow the line of a metal guardrail and yellow median markers, while sparse oncoming traffic continues to flicker past in the opposite lane. Finally, the view extends further into the arid landscape, stretching toward a hazy horizon under the muted light.
